---
name: Seat proposal
about: Propose a new Conclave seat or structural check
title: "seat: "
labels: seat-proposal
assignees: ""
---

## Seat name and slug

Example: `conclave-example-name`

## Stance or check

What single stance or structural verification axis does this seat guarantee?

## Why existing seats do not cover it

Name the closest existing seats and explain the gap.

## Bias or boundary

For advocates, what predictable failure mode does this stance have?
For Justices, what is out of scope?

## Polarity partner

Which existing seat is the deliberate counterweight?

## Capability-safety check

Confirm that the proposal does not claim the model gains a historical figure's
skill or expertise.
